name: Sausage Stew
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat a heavy 4-quart saucepan over medium-high heat.
2. Add the sausages and cook until brown, turning occasionally, about 30 minutes.
3. Transfer the sausages to a plate; cool slightly.
4. Cut the sausages into 1-inch pieces.
5. Remove all but 2 tablespoons of fat from the saucepan.
6. Add onions to the saucepan and saute over medium heat until tender, about 15 minutes.
7. Add bell peppers and garlic and continue cooking until the bell peppers just begin to soften, about 5 minutes.
8. Pour in white wine and boil for 1 minute.
9. Add potatoes, tomatoes, broth, and tomato paste. Simmer until the potatoes are tender, stirring occasionally, about 10 minutes.
10. Stir in green beans, sausages, and herbs. Cover and cook for 15 minutes.
11. Add all cheeses and stir.
